description_long: This is a light pink baseball cap made of soft fabric, featuring a curved brim and a rounded, six-panel crown with stitched ventilation eyelets. The front of the cap displays a colorful embroidered design with a stylized sun and horizontal stripes in shades of yellow, orange, and red, along with the text 'Yang 2020' in white and blue. The back of the cap has an adjustable strap with a metal clasp, allowing for a customizable fit. The fabric appears slightly worn in some areas, particularly near the brim and back edge. The overall finish is matte, with a soft and flexible structure typical of casual baseball caps. The cap is lightweight and designed for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A light pink fabric baseball cap with a curved brim, embroidered 'Yang 2020' sun logo, and an adjustable strap at the back.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the curved brim, side panel, and partial front embroidery.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full embroidered 'Yang 2020' sun logo and the cap's symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the plain side panel, curved brim, and a glimpse of the back strap.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the adjustable strap and metal clasp, with visible stitching and ventilation eyelets.
